items.title: SQLite migrations land in sqlite-utils
items.oneliner: Python CLI adds schema migrations and nested transactions, making SQLite app upgrades safer without pulling in a heavier ORM.

items.title: Mine Reddit complaints into product ideas
items.oneliner: Step-by-step Codex and Airtable workflow turns subreddit complaints into a reusable pipeline for finding startup pain points.

items.title: Record Codex skills from real tasks
items.oneliner: OpenAI's record-and-replay guide shows how to capture repetitive browser workflows and reuse them as editable Codex automations.

items.title: Fine-tune a tiny local classifier
items.oneliner: Hands-on walkthrough fine-tunes Qwen 3 0.6B with Unsloth to classify questions before vector search in a home RAG app.

items.title: Build near-instant domain autocomplete
items.oneliner: Detailed architecture shows how to hit p99 near 0 ms autocomplete across 240 million domains using prefetching and caching.

items.title: Rebuild nix-build in Go
items.oneliner: This tutorial reimplements nix-build in under 100 lines, making derivations and dependency execution finally click.

items.title: Compute camera rays correctly
items.oneliner: Practical shader walkthrough derives camera rays from projection matrices and includes reusable code for raster and ray tracing pipelines.

items.title: Use browser folder access for apps
items.oneliner: Concrete examples show how showDirectoryPicker enables local-first web apps that read and write real files without sync backends.

items.title: Manticore Search adds vector upgrades
items.oneliner: Installable search engine release adds auth, sharding, conversational search, and faster HNSW builds for production vector workloads.

items.title: Run Lisp in Rust types
items.oneliner: Wild GitHub repo implements Lisp inside Rust's type system, including recursion, lexical scope, and continuations.
